name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: ETW Logging Tamper In .NET Processes
notes:
This Building Block detects changes to environment variables related to ETW logging.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
SIGMA Title: ETW Logging Tamper In .NET Processes
SIGMA Description: Detects changes to environment variables related to ETW logging. This could indicate potential adversaries stopping ETW providers recording loaded .NET assemblies.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: ETW Logging Tamper In .NET Processes on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%complus_etwenabled%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%complus_etwflags%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: ETW Logging Tamper In .NET Processes on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%complus_etwenabled%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%complus_etwflags%' AQL filter query
